case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. MATTHEW SOLARIO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2) (TRANSACTION ID # 17317014) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $309.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17317014) AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARIO, MATTHEW

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARIO, MATTHEW DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-2018

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLARIO, MATTHEW $1,557.97 PRINCIPAL, $309.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,867.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17317014)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100029609), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE SERVED SEP-22-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARIO, MATTHEW
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17317014) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
